quorum.title: SA quorums & majorities
quorum.hint: Select the type of meeting and the convocation, then enter the total number of shares, the shares present and the votes in favour.
quorum.specialDecision: Decision on capital reduction or articles of association (constitutive GM) – unanimity required.
quorum.votesFor: Votes in favour of the resolution
quorum.noQuorumRule: No quorum rule: the meeting may deliberate regardless of the number of shares present.
quorum.quorumRule: Required quorum: at least {{percent}} % of shares
quorum.quorumOk: Quorum met: the meeting can validly deliberate.
quorum.quorumFail: Quorum not met: the meeting cannot deliberate.
quorum.majorityUnanimity: Required majority: unanimity of votes present.
quorum.majorityTwoThirds: Required majority: at least 2/3 of votes present.
quorum.majoritySimple: Required majority: more than half of votes present.
quorum.majorityOk: Majority met: the resolution can be adopted.
quorum.majorityFail: Majority not met: the resolution is rejected.
quorum.summaryNoQuorum: Quorum not met: a new meeting must be convened.
quorum.summaryAllOk: Quorum and majority met: the resolution can be adopted.
quorum.summaryNoMajority: Quorum met but majority not met: the resolution is rejected.

ratios.title: Usual ratios - Financial diagnostic & profitability
ratios.selectRatio: Please select the ratio to calculate.

descriptions.valueAdded: This ratio measures the company's contribution to the value of production.
descriptions.tradingMargin: This ratio measures the margin on sales relative to revenue.
descriptions.ebitda: This ratio measures operating profitability before financial charges and depreciation.
descriptions.netResult: This ratio measures the share of revenue remaining as net result.

ratios.waiting: Enter amounts to display the ratio and chart.

cabinet.title: The Firm
cabinet.intro1: ADOC Audit & Conseil is a structured and independent firm, operating in Senegal and across the West African sub-region. The firm supports public and private organizations facing complex governance, compliance, performance and transformation challenges.
cabinet.intro2: ADOC's positioning is based on a central conviction: the quality of decisions depends directly on the reliability of information, the robustness of analysis and the independence of advice.
cabinet.tip: Tip: hover over the carousel to pause. Click on an image to enlarge it.
cabinet.approach2: In-depth understanding of organizational realities in West Africa.
cabinet.approach3: Commitment to quality and confidentiality on sensitive assignments.

sectors.desc: Audit of projects funded by donors (World Bank, AfDB) and public bodies.
Tax and regulatory expertise for extractive industries and energy projects.
Legal audit, compliance review and financial risk management.
Support for startups and operators in their digital structuring.
Cost optimization and audit of complex projects.
Strategic advisory for clinics: budget management and compliance.
Structuring of investment vehicles and hotel management audit.
Business transfer, family governance and outsourcing.
